name: Perpetual Wrath
additional_info: Enchaining targets and hitting Chained targets with Restrain will add 1 stack of Perpetual Wrath. Each stack of Perpetual Wrath increases Restrain's (Mantra) damage by 8, capping out at 4 stacks for +32 damage.
desc: Unleash the true power of Restrain. Each successive hit will increase its damage. stacking up to the base damage.
